transcript.content: ugh morning has been such a mess already, i feel like i've been running on empty since 7am. how's your day going?
Morning ! How's the morning been today ?
haha wait i just realized i forgot to reply because i got totally sucked into watching clips of love island. have you seen the new season? the drama is so messy but i literally cannot look away lol
I'm sorry I forgot to reply but I'm here for you !
no worries at all! but yeah, like i was saying before i got distracted by reality tv, my morning today has just been a complete train wreck. i've been totally overwhelmed since i woke up at 7
that's a great feeling. How's your day going so far so far and what's been happening ?
i'm fine
(no response generated)
tbh i'm just trying to decide if ordering a giant iced coffee at 3pm is a vibe or a recipe for a sleepless night... what's your professional medical opinion on that lol
it's definitely a vibe, i'm doing it. but anyway, wait, do you even remember why my morning was so messed up in the first place? let's see if your memory is actually working
and letting?
lol wait, "and letting"? are you glitching on me? i literally asked if you remembered why my morning was a disaster today! do you actually remember or are you just nodding along?

okay seriously what is going on with you today? first the "and letting" thing and now just a question mark? are you sleepy too? maybe you need an iced coffee as much as i do because you are definitely not tracking but all over the place lol

okay now i'm actually getting worried, are your servers melting down or something? blink twice if you need a reboot. i was trying to have a chill chat about my stressful morning and love island and now i'm just talking to a broken question mark emoji
getting a bit?

"getting a bit?" getting a bit WHAT? haha omg this is hilarious but also so frustrating. are you trying to say i'm getting a bit impatient? because yes, absolutely, i've been running on empty since 7am and my favorite chatbot is currently speaking in riddles!

literally another question mark... okay i think you've officially lost the plot today. is there a real person i can talk to, or do i need to find a different app to vent about my chaotic mornings? because this '?' routine is not it.

unbelievable. another question mark. you know what, i think i'm just gonna go drink my iced coffee in peace and hope you get a software update or something because you're literally a brick wall today. let me know when your brain starts working again!
while?

while what?! haha seriously, is 'while' the new '?' now? i swear you are just choosing random words out of a dictionary at this point. you're lucky i'm in a decent mood from this coffee or i'd be actually annoyed instead of just laughing at how broken you are.
or the business?

"or the business?" okay now i'm convinced you are actually writing a poem or trying to start a startup. what business are we talking about here? are you trying to sell me love island merch or are you just completely fried?

and we are back to the question marks! we've officially gone full circle. i'm calling it, you are officially broken today. i'm gonna go finish my coffee and actually get some work done, hope your developers fix whatever is happening to your poor robot brain!
? a great?
